Id1.text: Felipe Gozon is the key person of GMA New Media which is a subsidiary of GMA Network, a public company.

Id2.text: Felipe Gozon is a key person in GMA New Media whose parent company is GMA Network, a public company.

Id3.text: GMA Network is a public company and also the parent company of GMA New Media where Felipe Gozon is the key person.
